plugins.name: onemem
plugins.description: Persistent cross-session memory for Claude Code via PowerMem

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns

plugins.name: everything-claude-code
plugins.description: A complete system: skills, instincts, memory optimization, continuous learning, security scanning, and research-first development

plugins.name: claude-mem
plugins.description: Claude-Mem 通过自动捕获工具使用观察、生成语义摘要并使其可用于未来会话,无缝保留跨会话的上下文。这使 Claude 能够在会话结束或重新连接后仍保持对项目的知识连续性。
